title: The Mobile Ergonomics Update
highlights: Mobile Graph Controls: A compact toggle menu for graph actions, maximizing screen space for lore exploration on small devices.
Real-time Vault Stats: The vault selector now correctly displays the actual number of entities stored in every campaign.
Performance Boost: Smoother vault loading and snappier search indexing, especially for large knowledge bases.
Keyless AI Node Merging: Core AI-powered organization features now work without requiring a personal API key.

title: The Aesthetic Graph Update
highlights: Themed Graph Nodes: High-contrast, category-tinted nodes for better visual grouping and hierarchy at a glance.
Intelligent Graph Clustering: Improved layout logic that creates tighter, more intuitive connectivity clouds.
Unified Image Lightbox: A powerful new popout viewer for all character and location art across the application.
Compact Zen Mode: A more streamlined writing interface that prioritizes screen space for your content.

title: The Discovery Update
highlights: Entity Alias Support: Add multiple names to your characters and locations for more flexible search and cross-referencing.
Adjustable Workspace: Resizable sidebars allow you to customize the interface for your specific editing workflow.
Interactive Label Filtering: Easily discover related entities using advanced multi-label filtering in the explorer.
Responsive AI Oracle: A faster, more responsive AI chat experience that stays out of your way while you work.

title: The Tactical Explorer Update
highlights: Label-Grouped Explorer: Organize your vault by labels with collapsible sections and persisted view preferences.
VTT Entity List: Access your entire vault directly from the VTT sidebar to streamline encounter management.
Token Drag-and-Drop: Seamlessly place tokens on tactical maps by dragging entities from the sidebar.
Zen Popout Refinements: Enhanced reliability and error handling for detached entity view windows.

title: The Playable Tabletop Update
highlights: Data-Native VTT: Turn your maps into playable, tactical encounters directly linked to your lore.
Peer-to-Peer Multiplayer: Host zero-setup sessions and invite players directly to your maps with real-time sync.
Fantasy Theme Refresh: A massive visual overhaul with deep fantasy aesthetics, cohesive typography (Alegreya), and rich styling.
In-App Changelog: Automatic notifications to keep you up to date on new features.

title: The Living Hub Update
highlights: Vault Front Page: A completely redesigned dashboard offering a living briefing room, pinned notes, and recent activity.
Traditional Entity Explorer: A powerful new sidebar and focus mode for deep, distraction-free entity editing.
Free Oracle Tier: Everyone now gets access to the Lore Oracle's core features out of the box.

title: The Spatial Canvas Update
highlights: Infinite Spatial Canvas: A massive new way to visually organize, group, and connect your entities outside the strict graph constraints.
Integrated Die Roller: Fully featured, fair 3D die rolling directly in your workspace.
Pop-out Help & Guides: A comprehensive, dockable help system to guide you through mastering Codex Cryptica.

title: The Robust Storage Update
highlights: OPFS & Dexie Integration: A total rewrite of the local storage engine for lightning-fast performance and metadata caching.
Multi-Campaign Switching: Seamlessly jump between different isolated vaults and campaigns.
Robust Local & Cloud Sync: Bulletproof Google Drive synchronization paired with local-first file system mirroring.

title: The Oracle Ascension Update
highlights: Chat Commands & Proposer: Ask the AI to propose new connections, generate images, or analyze plot holes directly from the chat.
Image Generation: Distill your entity descriptions into stunning, AI-generated character and location art.
Smart PDF Import: Drop lore bibles or PDFs onto the screen to have them automatically parsed and mapped into your graph.

title: The World Timeline Update
highlights: World Timeline: A chronological view of your world's events, eras, and history.
Node Merging: Combine duplicate or related entities into a single, cohesive node.
Rich Text Formatting: Enhanced markdown support for more expressive and readable notes.

title: The Advanced Graph Update
highlights: Fog of War for Graph: Hide unrevealed nodes from players during shared sessions or exports.
Central Node Orbit: Focus on a single entity and see its immediate connections orbit around it.
Connection Labels: Add descriptive text to the lines connecting your entities.

title: The Customization Update
highlights: Styling Templates: Apply custom visual themes to specific nodes or categories.
Entity Labeling: Tag and organize entities with custom, color-coded labels.
Node Read Mode: A clean, distraction-free view for reading long-form entity content.

title: The Oracle Intelligence Update
highlights: Lore Oracle Intelligence: The AI assistant can now answer complex questions about your specific world lore.
Oracle RAG Improvements: Vastly improved retrieval accuracy ensures the AI pulls exactly the right context.
Oracle Data Parsing: The AI can extract structured data directly from your text notes.

title: The Campaign Management Update
highlights: Share Campaigns: Generate read-only links to share your world with players.
Campaign Date Picker: Set and track the current in-world date for your sessions.
Flexible Categories: Create custom entity types beyond the default schema.

title: The Graph Engine Update
highlights: Minimap Navigation: Quickly pan around massive knowledge graphs using the new minimap.
Graph Focus Mode: Isolate sub-graphs and filter out noise for deep-dive worldbuilding.
Delete Nodes: Safely remove entities and automatically clean up orphaned connections.

title: The Search & Discovery Update
highlights: Fuzzy Search: Instantly find any entity, connection, or text snippet across your entire vault.
Mobile UX Refinements: Improved touch targets, sidebar navigation, and sync feedback for mobile devices.
Performance Improvements: Large graph rendering and search indexing optimizations.

title: The Foundations Update
highlights: Core Entity Schema: Established the foundational Markdown and YAML structure for all data.
Svelte Sync Engine: The first iteration of local-first reactivity across the graph and editor.
Google Drive Mirroring: Automatic, silent backups of your local vault to the cloud.
